holdings.infoBox: QQQU is an equity ETF with a total of 17 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 15.08%, Alphabet at 12.94%, Apple at 12.64%, NVIDIA at 12.52%, and Amazon.com at 12.14%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Magnificent 7 Bull 2X ETF (QQQU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Indxx Magnificent 7 index. The fund tracks 2x the daily price movements of an equal-weighted index of the seven largest NASDAQ-listed companies. QQQU was launched on Mar 7, 2024 and is issued by Direxion.
